name: Continue
description: The server has received the request headers and the client should proceed to send the request body.

name: Switching Protocols
description: The requester has asked the server to switch protocols and the server is acknowledging that it will do so.

name: OK
description: Standard response for successful HTTP requests.

name: Created
description: The request has been fulfilled and resulted in a new resource being created.

name: Accepted
description: The request has been accepted for processing, but the processing has not been completed.

name: No Content
description: The server successfully processed the request, but is not returning any content.

name: Multiple Choices
description: Indicates multiple options for the resource that the client may follow.

name: Moved Permanently
description: This and all future requests should be directed to the given URI.

name: Found
description: Tells the client to look at (browse to) another URL.

name: Not Modified
description: Indicates that the resource has not been modified since the version specified by the request headers.

name: Bad Request
description: The server cannot or will not process the request due to an apparent client error.

name: Unauthorized
description: Similar to 403 Forbidden, but specifically for use when authentication is required and has failed or has not yet been provided.

name: Forbidden
description: The request was valid, but the server is refusing action.

name: Not Found
description: The requested resource could not be found but may be available in the future.

name: Method Not Allowed
description: A request method is not supported for the requested resource.

name: Request Timeout
description: The server timed out waiting for the request.

name: Too Many Requests
description: The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time.

name: Internal Server Error
description: A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered.

name: Not Implemented
description: The server either does not recognize the request method, or it lacks the ability to fulfill the request.

name: Bad Gateway
description: The server was acting as a gateway or proxy and received an invalid response from the upstream server.

name: Service Unavailable
description: The server is currently unable to handle the request due to a temporary overload or maintenance.

name: Gateway Timeout
description: The server was acting as a gateway or proxy and did not receive a timely response from the upstream server.
